title: Kremlin aide says talks between Putin, Xi Jinping went 'very well'
description: Yury Ushakov noted that the leaders touched upon the issues "in the trade and economic area, but some foreign policy topics were also discussed"
snippet:
MOSCOW, May 16. /TASS/. Talks between Russian President Vladimir Putin and Chinese President Xi Jinping went well, Kremlin Aide Yury Ushakov said.
